d:\a\bz

ntpath.join('a', '')z
a\z ntpath.join('a', '', '', '', '')z

ntpath.join('a/', '')z
ntpath.join('a/b', 'x/y')z
a/b\x/yz
ntpath.join('/a/b', 'x/y')z
/a/b\x/yz
ntpath.join('/a/b/', 'x/y')z
/a/b/x/yz

c:x/yz
ntpath.join('c:a/b', 'x/y')z	c:a/b\x/yz

ntpath.join('c:/', 'x/y')z
c:/x/yz

c:/a/b\x/yz

c:/a/b/x/yz&ntpath.join('//computer/share', 'x/y')z
//computer/share\x/yz'ntpath.join('//computer/share/', 'x/y')z
//computer/share/x/yz*ntpath.join('//computer/share/a/b', 'x/y')z
//computer/share/a/b\x/yz
ntpath.join('a/b', '/x/y')z
/x/yz

ntpath.join('c:', '/x/y')z

ntpath.join('c:/', '/x/y')z
ntpath.join('c:/a/b', '/x/y')z'ntpath.join('//computer/share', '/x/y')z(ntpath.join('//computer/share/', '/x/y')z)ntpath.join('//computer/share/a', '/x/y')z

barbarz
